title: Jain Hospital
description: Jain Hospital - Jain Neuro & IVF Hospitals Pvt Ltd - is located in Jagriti Enclave on Vikas Marg Extension, Delhi and has been serving families for over 25 years.

Maternity & Infertility Know more Under the guidance of Gynaecologist & IVF Specialist Dr. Sangeeta Jain (Gold Medalist), Jain Hospital offers a full fledged Maternity & IVF center. Dermatology Our Dermatology & Cosmetology department has a good hold on various chemical peels, aesthetic counseling and procedures like PRP, subcisions, etc. Know your doctor Neurology We are known for our years of expertise in Neurology and Neuro Surgery. Our dedicated Neuro ICU and specialised doctors make all the difference. Dept. Of Neurology Video Consutlation Jain Hospital offers video consultation appointments, starting INR Rs. 600 per appointment.

While balanced nutrition, regular exercise, quality sleep, and stress management remain essential, many individuals are also exploring wellness products that may complement their daily routines.



The Foundation of Better Wellness



A strong wellness routine begins with consistent habits. These may include:




Eating whole, nutrient-rich foods



Staying active throughout the week



Drinking enough water



Getting enough rest



Managing stress in healthy ways



Scheduling regular health checkups




These simple practices create a reliable foundation for long-term health.

Continue Reading Why a Holistic Approach to Wellness Matters More Than Ever Modern health and wellness extend far beyond simply treating illness. More people are focusing on proactive habits that support physical health, mental well-being, and long-term vitality. A holistic approach considers the entire person, recognizing that nutrition, movement, sleep, stress management, and preventive care all work together to influence overall wellness.



The Foundation of Good Health



Creating a strong wellness foundation starts with consistent daily habits. While there is no one-size-fits-all solution, several practices have been shown to support long-term health:




Eating a balanced diet rich in whole foods



Staying physically active throughout the week



Drinking enough water daily



Prioritizing quality sleep



Managing stress effectively



Scheduling regular health... Continue Reading Natural Wellness Choices That Support a Calmer Routine A calmer routine often begins with simple daily choices that help the body and mind feel more balanced. Many people look toward natural wellness habits because they want steady support without making their day feel complicated. A peaceful lifestyle can come from small changes, such as better sleep, mindful movement, nourishing meals, quiet moments, and thoughtful product choices that match personal wellness goals.



Creating a Grounded Start



Mornings can shape the mood of the entire day. Starting with water, light stretching, and a few minutes of stillness can help create a more focused mindset. Some people enjoy journaling, listening to soft... Continue Reading Understanding Depression: Symptoms, Causes, and Treatment Depression is one of the most common and misunderstood mental health conditions affecting people worldwide. It goes far beyond occasional sadness or a rough day—it is a serious, often debilitating disorder that impacts every aspect of a person’s life, including how they think, feel, and function daily.
This article aims to help you understand what depression is, recognize its symptoms, explore potential causes, and learn about effective treatment options. Whether you’re struggling yourself or supporting someone who is, knowledge is the first step toward healing. What Is Depression? Depression, also known as major depressive disorder, is a mood disorder characterized... Continue Reading Why Proper Vaccine Administration Matters for Community Health Vaccines are one of the most effective tools in combating infectious diseases and safeguarding public health. By preventing illnesses such as measles, polio, and influenza, vaccines not only protect individuals but also create a shield of immunity for entire communities. However, the success of vaccination programs hinges on more than just the development of effective vaccines—proper vaccine administration is equally crucial. Incorrect techniques or errors in delivery can undermine the efficacy of vaccines and, in some cases, pose risks to recipients. Ensuring that vaccines are administered correctly is essential for maximizing their benefits and promoting overall community health.
